rationale: Educ. Code §7.055 enumerates the commissioner's administrative powers and duties. Changing the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b) does not alter or conflict with any operative duty assigned to the commissioner in this section.
quote: The commissioner shall perform duties in connection with the Foundation School Program as prescribed by Chapter 48.
_note: No direct conflict. Downstream fiscal impacts on school funding may require rulemaking under Chapter 48, but §7.055 itself is not operatively affected.
